summary: Completed backend API testing for application rejection comment functionality. Frontend testing partially completed due to navigation/routing issues preventing access to moderator dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful login, user is redirected to homepage instead of applications dashboard

integration_issues.issue: Navigation to /moderator/applications fails after login, redirects to homepage

passed_tests: Backend API: Application status update with comment (rejection)
Backend API: Application status update with comment (approval)
Backend API: Email function accepts manager_comment parameter
Backend API: Vote on application functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend routing issue: After successful login, users are redirected to homepage instead of applications dashboard. This prevents testing of UI features including warning banner and 'Not Voted' filter button. Check authentication persistence and routing logic in React app.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 20% (login works, dashboard access fails)
